name: Keren - TK 2018
subject: Kavanaugh hearings, special counsel investigation, and the President's tweets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Is it just me, or have these past few weeks of news been even more hectic than usual? Starting with Judge Brett Kavanaugh's Supreme Court confirmation hearings --------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

Is it just me, or have these past few weeks of news been even more hectic than usual? Between Judge Brett Kavanaugh's Supreme Court confirmation hearings, new revelations from the special counsel's investigation, and everything President Trump throws at us from his Twitter account, it's hard to cut through the noise and figure out what folks are really focusing on.

That's why I wanted to check in with you, Derek. As we move into the final stretch of this campaign, I want to know what issues in the news Virginians like you care most about. **Do you have three minutes to take our short survey about what matters to you?** | [**TAKE SURVEY**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f113a/3e0906/72f22811/3e36dc29/1998688524/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/First-Week-of-September?source=20180906_3_SURV_KCD_news-survey&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+TAKE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=20180906_3_SURV_KCD_news-survey")
---
We know that right now, with the 24-hour news cycle, Virginians are more tuned into politics and current events than ever before, and we want to make sure we're talking to voters like you wherever you may be, about whatever you may be worried about. These surveys help us do just that - responding is a quick and easy way to support the campaign.

[So please, take our survey today. It helps our campaign more than you know.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f113a/3e0906/72f22811/3e36dc28/1998688524/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/First-Week-of-September?source=20180906_3_SURV_KCD_news-survey&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+So+please+take+our+survey+today+It+helps&utm_campaign=20180906_3_SURV_KCD_news-survey")

Appreciate your help,

_Keren_

Keren Charles Dongo
TK 2018 Campaign Manager

[https://secure.timkaine.com/First-Week-of-September](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f113a/3e0906/72f22811/3e36dc2f/1998688524/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/First-Week-of-September?source=20180906_3_SURV_KCD_news-survey&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+httpssecuretimkainecomFirstWeekofSeptemb&utm_campaign=20180906_3_SURV_KCD_news-survey")

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: You'll be the difference this fall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- Today marks two months until Election Day. **If you 've been waiting for the right moment to get involved, this is it.** We're having our next Weekend of Action this Saturday and Sunday -- it's your next opportunity to have an impact on this race. [**Say you 'll be part of it by signing up for an event near you.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff8f/4462dc26/670783ca/2005aa02/167934853/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiI0MzUyNiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/?max_dist=50&zip=43526&utm_source=FOSB&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=SEPT") Don't underestimate your ability to make a major difference this fall. You're engaged. You're paying attention. You care about the issues we're facing as a country. So here's what I'm asking you to do: Make phone calls. Knock on doors. Talk to five of your friends about the stakes in November, and about how important it is to elect Democrats up-and-down the ticket. Together, we can create the kind of change we want to see, in Ohio and beyond. [**Don 't sit on the sidelines between now and Election Day. Take the first step by signing up for an event this weekend.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff8f/4462dc26/670783ca/2005aa02/167934853/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiI0MzUyNiJ9/ "https://events.mobilizeamerica.io/ohdems/?max_dist=50&zip=43526&utm_source=FOSB&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=SEPT") With gratitude, Sherrod

name: Urgent@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: POLITICO predicts the Senate will likely go to Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Just released.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4aad8/c1f7015/6d822cc7/1141e728/2871103224/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180906PM-A&recurring=auto") **URGENT:_POLITICO_ predicts the Senate will likely go to Republicans** Fight back: **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4aad8/c1f7015/6d822cc7/1141e728/2871103224/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180906PM-A&recurring=auto")** This new rating from _POLITICO_ comes just one week after The Cook Political Report moved our race towards Republicans and two polls came out showing this race in the single digits. **We can 't afford to lose any more ground, friend. We won't take back the Senate if we lose this seat -- and it's going to take everything we have to defend it.** Super PACs and special interests have pledged to spend millions in Minnesota this November, and we need every dollar you can give to hold them off. This latest race prediction from _POLITICO_ comes just as Tina and Senate Democrats are fighting with everything they have to stop Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court.
We must ensure that we stop this seat from going red and Democrats can stop Trump's agenda in the Senate, but that will take a big grassroots effort from everyone on this team. _CNN_ called this state "ground zero in the 2018 midterms" and we have to fight like it.
**Republican special interests and dark money organizations have millions to spend, but we can defeat them if we hit our goals.[Will you pitch in $10 so we can stay on track in September and defend this seat?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4aad8/c1f7015/6d822cc7/1141e728/2871103224/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180906PM-A&recurring=auto")**
Keep fighting,
Team Tina

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Layoffs Just Reached a Half-Century Low
body:
| |
---
#
# _Layoffs Just Reached a Half-Century Low_
#
“The number of Americans filing applications for new unemployment benefits fell at the end of August to a nearly five-decade low,” Sharon Nunn reports in _The Wall Street Journal_. “Initial jobless claims, a proxy for layoffs across the U.S., declined to a seasonally adjusted 203,000 in the last week of August, the Labor Department said Thursday.” **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA3Ljk0NTg3NTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNy45NDU4NzU3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgzMTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/wall-street-journal-layoffs-just-reached-half-century-low/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr)** In [**The Dallas Morning News**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA3Ljk0NTg3NTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNy45NDU4NzU3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgzMTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.dallasnews.com/opinion/commentary/2018/09/05/cornyn-cruz-stop-trash-talk-supreme-court-nominee-kavanaugh), Senators John Cornyn (R-TX) and Ted Cruz (R-TX) write that Democrats have stooped to a new low with their antics against Judge Brett Kavanaugh. “We are both lawyers who have argued before the U.S. Supreme Court,” the Senators explain. “We know when a black robe fits. When it comes to our nation's highest court, Kavanaugh will wear it proudly, and he will wear it well, as he makes careful, cogent decisions that impact the history of our nation.” “A nominee with 12 years of service on the second highest court in the land, authoring 308 opinions, earning the highest rating from the American Bar Association, acquitting himself beautifully during long hours of senatorial grilling while displaying class, calm, intellect and good humor, Judge Kavanaugh’s confirmation was never at any risk,” Matt Mackowiak argues in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA3Ljk0NTg3NTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNy45NDU4NzU3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgzMTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/sep/5/as-democrats-flail-kavanaugh-sailing-to-court/). In [**_The Daily Signal_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA3Ljk0NTg3NTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNy45NDU4NzU3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgzMTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/09/06/why-trump-was-right-to-end-funding-for-the-un-palestinian-aid-organization/), foreign policy experts Brett Schaefer and James Phillips write that President Trump made the right call by ending funding for the U.N.’s Palestinian aid organization. “Previous administrations let the fear of the unknown lead them to continue support in the face of ever-more implacable Palestinian demands and mounting evidence that U.S. taxpayer dollars were being used indirectly or diverted to support Palestinian extremism and violence.” “Americans are rightly concerned that Big Tech companies in Silicon Valley have an outsized influence over the news and opinions we see on social media platforms and in Google searches,” Paula Bolyard writes in [**_PJ Media_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA3Ljk0NTg3NTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNy45NDU4NzU3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgzMTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://pjmedia.com/election/bombshell-report-90-percent-of-google-employee-political-contributions-went-to-democrats/). “A study released today from GovPredict shows that more than 90 percent of political donations by Alphabet [Google’s parent company] employees went to Democrats.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA3Ljk0NTg3NTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNy45NDU4NzU3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgzMTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA3Ljk0NTg3NTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNy45NDU4NzU3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgzMTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTA3Ljk0NTg3NTcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkwNy45NDU4NzU3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzgzMTk2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: DWS (Congresswoman)
subject: I reject Brett Kavanaugh.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | _UPDATE: Brett Kavanaugh's hearings have begun.
**Reject Kavanaugh.[Add your name >>](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5a/622b7b5b/1cb37f2c/307b6fb3/4017564862/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180906b")**_ **Hearings on the confirmation of Brett Kavanaugh for the Supreme Court started this week, you know.** The White House is still concealing more than 100,000 documents on Kavanaugh's work during the Bush administration. **_There's no telling what they're trying to hide._** Here's what we do know -- this administration is set on bringing this country back to the days of back-alley abortions and insurance companies dictating who can get health care, and how much we pay for it. From what we do know of Brett Kavanaugh, he's completely on board with the radical Trump agenda. He doesn't belong on this nation's highest court. [**Add your name to reject Brett Kavanaugh >>**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5a/622b7b5b/1cb37f2c/307b6fb3/4017564862/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180906b") I will not back down on protecting _Roe vs. Wade_ and a woman's right to make our own health care decisions. I will not stop fighting to make sure the Affordable Care Act remains in place, and the millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions remain protected. Thank you for continuing to fight beside me. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f5a/622b7b5b/1cb37f2c/307b6fb2/4017564862/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Elise Convy [Finance Director]
subject: Can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
There's never been a more important time to support grassroots politics that puts people first. As one of Amy's close supporters, you know this is an issue she cares deeply about.
Amy believes Minnesota needs a strong team in the U.S. Senate working on our behalf**\-- and WE know the strongest team for Minnesota is Senator Amy Klobuchar and Senator Tina Smith.**
Tina is a champion for Minnesota. She's smart and tenacious. And more than anything, she's someone who won't rest until the work is done. And now, she needs our help.
**Can you help BOTH of our campaigns with a donation today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Tina Smith and Amy Klobuchar will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=u46fVK4t3Va80EDAnIs2w2fl8PuqZqkG)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=yjF%2BfI70xXDRhZhp7wD5vGfl8PuqZqkG)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=W59IajcyPXERcPh3iLLnwWfl8PuqZqkG)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=lPlhbPUuOX1UbBWnFf9YWWfl8PuqZqkG)**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5LzCEgrH1yNAhnXGOBKpVWfl8PuqZqkG)****
Every little amount makes a big difference.
Thanks.
\-- Elise [Finance Director]
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Amy Klobuchar
Subject: Two Seats
> Hi,
>
> As my colleague in the Senate this past year, I've seen Tina Smith go right to work solving problems for Minnesotans.
>
> She listens, she brings people together to get results, and -- make no mistake -- she will do what it takes to get the job done.
>
> Tina is committed to getting the job done for the people of our state, but _she 's also facing one of the only special elections for the U.S. Senate in 2018._ Tina is up to the challenge, but I know firsthand that she needs you on her side to win an election this big.
>
> The truth is, to win in November we're _both_ counting on your grassroots support -- so **will you chip in to our campaigns today?**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Tina Smith and me will go through immediately:_
> ---
> **[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=42GMchMa6%2FU4a2IvIQ9hDGfl8PuqZqkG)**
> **[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=whgp6SGgYjyKUdsAroQ2CWfl8PuqZqkG)**
> **[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fiVvoMs2z0pjeOA%2B8Mdlomfl8PuqZqkG)**
> **[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=LX5MbzSf1LLqwyCcxrKsyWfl8PuqZqkG)**
> ****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=6C4NgmYC%2FFDEL64bdy5Ui2fl8PuqZqkG)****
> Tina is ready to win this election so she can keep fighting for Minnesotans, but no one can do it alone.
>
> Thanks, your support means a lot.
>
> Amy Klobuchar
>
> P.S. -- This is a critical election and Minnesotans will vote for two U.S. Senators this year -- [**will you chip in today to help win BOTH of Minnesota 's U.S. Senate seats?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=7%2BEyvR57DuwILeAbSjV%2BvWfl8PuqZqkG)
>
>

**[Contribute](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=NIjeoZS1XfqAHrGAYuKvx2fl8PuqZqkG)**

name: Tina Smith
subject: We're behind right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
A personal request.

| **Friend, my team just got****word****our opponent is on the air with a surprise ad buy.** This is on top of the support she is receiving from special interests, a pro-Trump dark money organization, and the White House itself. This makes hitting our September goal incredibly important -- and at this moment we're more than $7,000 behind where we need to be. And with the _Star-Tribune_ saying "control of the Senate... and the fate of Trump's agenda are on the line," we know how important winning this race is. Our team is counting on grassroots supporters like you to provide the resources we need to fund ads, organizers, signs, and everything our campaign needs to do to win. **Can you pitch in before midnight so we can get back on track? You can donate here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4aaff/c1f7015/6d8f34b4/1141e832/959329582/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180907_em-B&recurring=auto")** We know Trump, McConnell, and those big money special interests won't slow down between now and November -- and we can't either. Thank you for everything, Tina

name: Jason Yates
subject: Dr. David Jeremiah answers an important question.
body:
| | What to do when there is no clear Christian candidate.
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRW3we3u8oKwtxLPg1pS-XO91zL_ueHW-6ol0s7MzBW2RNEHsUgfZYjADKQIYQFZbA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180907com01&n=1)
| **Peter,** **There is an important question many faith voters ask in the midst of an election season, “What are we to do when there is no clear Christian candidate to vote for?”** **More than 10,000 verified elections are taking place this year. This includes statewide governor races, and Congressional elections, all the way down to local school board races in our communities.** **As people of faith, how do we know who to vote for in these elections?** **Take a minute to read Dr. Jeremiah’s biblical insight on this question in the article below.** **Dr. David Jeremiah is among the best-known Christian leaders in the world and we are honored to have him as a My Faith Votes influencer.** Christians have a God-given calling to be salt and light in the world around them, and an obvious way to fulfill that duty in America during an election year is to vote. We must approach this responsibility through prayer and by comparing a candidate’s positions and character against the convictions God’s word has instilled in our hearts. “When the righteous increase, the people rejoice, but when the wicked rule, the people groan.”
Proverbs 29:2 It’s been said that a democratic nation will get the political leaders it deserves, and of course, this makes perfect sense. Our duly elected representatives are a direct reflection of the character, values and yes, the faith of our people. In a very real sense, they are us, and so we must take very seriously the role we play in selecting them. Allow me to put it another way: Whenever and wherever possible we should support candidates who uphold and promote Judeo-Christian principles. The idea, though, that there will be candidates who perfectly line up with the tenets of our faith, is unfortunately wishful thinking on this side of eternity. There may never be a candidate who perfectly represents you or me, but we cannot choose to sit out an election because there’s no clear Christian option in a given election. That would ensure we have no seat at the governing table and that our policy priorities go unheard. Instead, politics, by its very nature, is an exercise in compromise and we must not allow the current uncompromising political climate in Washington to cause us to become myopic and narrow-minded in our own right. It is far better to have elected leaders who aren’t outright hostile to our faith and our values than to have leaders who might seek to diminish Christianity’s influence in America. Evangelicals comprise one of the largest, if not the largest, voting blocks in this country, but what difference does it make if millions of us choose not to go to the polls? My decision — your decision — has consequences in our nation, and indeed around the world, that are more profound than we might imagine. That is why I must vote. That is why you must vote. It is our right as Americans, and it is our sacred responsibility as Christians. _**Dr. David Jeremiah**_ _serves as senior pastor of Shadow Mountain Community Church in El Cajon, California and is the founder and host of Turning Point. Turning Point‘s 30-minute radio program is heard on more than 2,200 radio stations daily. He has written more than fifty books._ **We encourage you to read the other articles in My Faith Votes latest newsletter issue,[Your Guide to Voting](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRW3we3u8oKwtxLPg1pS-XO91zL_ueHW-6ol0s7MzBW2RNEHsUgfZYjADKQIYQFZbA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180907com01&n=2), to help you get ready for the November elections. ** **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180907com01&n=3)
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180907com01&n=4).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=xVQJp8sIg0YIME9Lo-Z4syIdVRw_HYS0jEt2wMUQx2eEuRFK5ZOguLktpeYbxh9N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180907com01&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FPXYBx5Xyt4ogPU1qeCocIOlLGlV2jWcvDCbIYySOYm8m4a6nxzoW0Ja2quI4O6s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180907com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GevmR3RZALWcgxRmRAu8Xs945EaPwemE7bkwg1RsifpjRSkA2HhVJBLM7TbCqLQ4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180907com01&n=7)

name: David Ortiz
subject: make it a success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hello friend,
**This weekend, we are kicking off our statewide "Get Out The Vote" campaign** for the Rhode Island Democratic Primary! We are going to be knocking doors and making phone calls all across Rhode Island, **and we need your help to make it a success!**
**[Click here to register for a canvass near you, or a phone bank!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a019/5e076a9e/541a2037/14425b0f/453432074/VEsH/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/mEcDw6aHXUmfoljzf16Hbg2")**
**Everyone who comes out to vote on Wednesday, September 12 has a real chance to make a difference** , to be the deciding vote. That's why it is absolutely critical to contact as many voters across the state as we can. **[Will you register for a"Get Out The Vote" event now?](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a019/5e076a9e/541a2037/14425b0f/453432074/VEsE/ "https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/mEcDw6aHXUmfoljzf16Hbg2")**
Thank you,
David
David Ortiz
Deputy Campaign Manager

\-------
###### Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo. This email is not intended for any Rhode Island state government employees. If you are a Rhode Island state government employee, please disregard and let us know so we can unsubscribe you from future emails. Per Rhode Island State Law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $1,000 per year. Business and corporate checks are prohibited.
###### Friends of Gina Raimondo
PO Box 40794
Providence, RI 02940
###### This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
###### If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, visit [https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a019/5e076a9e/541a2037/14425b0e/453432074/VEsF/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/unsubscribe").

We'll be blunt, everyone -- Our last public quarterly deadline is in just a few weeks and since we fell behind in both July and August, we have to hunker down in September.
Unfortunately, we're pacing behind, and we're worried about what happens if we fall short.
Maggie Hassan won her 2016 Senate race by just 1,017 votes and with Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell pushing their second far-right pick through to the Supreme Court, we can't afford to lose a single Democratic Senate seat -- now, or in the next few years.

name: Democratic Poll
subject: Do Cresco voters want a Democratic governor in Pennsylvania? (instant poll)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | Hello,

Governors are our last line of defense when Donald Trump and the Republican-led Congress wreak havoc on our nation.

_**But only 16 state governors are Democrats.**_ And when state legislative maps have been hopelessly gerrymandered to give Republicans a supermajority, Democratic governors may be the last check against Trump and Republican extremism on the state level.

**[We believe people like you in Cresco are the key to a Democratic wave in Congress -- and in states across the nation. But we need to hear what you think about Democratic governors. So please, take our instant poll now:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec139/73a2bc12/27eb9ac8/1fce66ff/350385127/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/dem-govs-poll?gpsid=14_50_3435&source=em18_180907_govpol_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180907_govpol_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+We+believe+people+like+you+in+CITYyour+a")** | [**RESPONSE NEEDED:**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec139/73a2bc12/27eb9ac8/1fce66fe/350385127/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/dem-govs-poll?gpsid=14_50_3435&source=em18_180907_govpol_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180907_govpol_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+RESPONSE+NEEDED")

| **[NO](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec139/73a2bc12/27eb9ac8/1fce66e3/350385127/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/dem-govs-poll?gpsid=14_50_3435&source=em18_180907_govpol_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180907_govpol_engg_gq_act__wfp_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5+-+NO")**

We're doing everything we can to make sure that Governor Wolf wins on Election Day so he can continue to fight for us.

That won't be easy in a state that President Trump won in 2016. In Pennsylvania, and across the country, Republicans keep saying that we can't win. They're trying to defeat our blue wave.

But by showing you stand with us -- and Democratic candidates running for governor across the country -- we know we can win on every level of government in November.

body:
Peter,
With less than two months until Election Day, it’s time for Steve King to step up and answer our challenge to debate. A time-honored tradition of our democracy, the people of Iowa’s 4th Congressional District deserve to see the differences between the candidates running to represent them. **Click below to see my official challenge to Steve King!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2124964/11012925/-2103046723?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzlhZDExMC1jY2IyLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMzY2YzEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw82q26kNnWS3reV5-K60FkaQgx664DZ9N1lfY3sYdg=)
At a time when voters are demanding answers to questions about our economy, our healthcare system, and a looming farm crisis, Steve King hasn’t held a Town Hall, done any public events, or participated in a real debate in years. J.D. Scholten

name: Ben Jealous
subject: BREAKING: Donald Trump attacked us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
It's time to fight back.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b9f1/7ab0e2c4/7e25f0bb/3498a125/1606409799/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-trump-attacks?refcode=OHQ09078A") Friend, Last night at his rally in Montana, Donald Trump finally did it -- he attacked me personally: _"In Maryland, the Democrat candidate for governor wants to give illegal aliens free college tuition, courtesy of the American taxpayer. Come on in, free college!"_ He attacked my plan to extend tuition-free community college to all Maryland residents, including DREAMers. And he attacked it with the same hateful language he always uses -- rhetoric meant to divide us. **I'm calling on Larry Hogan to reject this divisive rhetoric, agree that all of Maryland's children deserve a quality education, and publicly reject Donald Trump's efforts to campaign for him.** [**Until then, we need to show that we're united: Donate $5 or more now to show we stand overwhelmingly against Donald Trump's politics of fear and hate.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b9f1/7ab0e2c4/7e25f0bb/3498a125/1606409799/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-trump-attacks?refcode=OHQ09078A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b9f1/7ab0e2c4/7e25f0bb/3498a124/1606409799/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-trump-attacks?refcode=OHQ09078A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

---
| [**$250 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b9f1/7ab0e2c4/7e25f0bb/3498a120/1606409799/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-trump-attacks?refcode=OHQ09078A&amount=250&express_lane=true")
---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b9f1/7ab0e2c4/7e25f0bb/3498a123/1606409799/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-trump-attacks?refcode=OHQ09078A&express_lane=true")
---
We can't ignore that Maryland's GDP, which has experienced dismal growth under Larry Hogan's tenure, would increase by more than $1.6 billion if just half of Maryland's DACA-eligible residents completed their education requirements for legal permanent status. DREAMers in Maryland currently contribute more than $40 million annually in state and local taxes.
Donald Trump has raised $100,000 for Hogan's campaign this cycle. Now, we see the impact of this tainted Trump cash.
**So I've got to ask: If we aren't running against a Trump Republican, why is Donald Trump out campaigning for him anyway and donating thousands of dollars, too?**
[**Maryland needs courageous leadership at the state level willing to stand up for Maryland values: If you agree, donate $5 or more now to fight back against Donald Trump's hateful attacks on this campaign.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37b9f1/7ab0e2c4/7e25f0bb/3498a125/1606409799/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-trump-attacks?refcode=OHQ09078A")
Thanks,
Ben

name: Bob Hugin for Senate
subject: What They Are Saying!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
RIPPED FROM THE HEADLINES Washington Examiner | Republicans see chance for major upset in New Jersey Senate race | |
---
**RIPPED FROM THE HEADLINES**
* Washington Examiner | Republicans see chance for major upset in New Jersey Senate race
* Burlington County Times | Republican Bob Hugin aiming to defy history with U.S. Senate bid
* Fox News | Menendez, in fight for political life, forcing Dems to spend more on his campaign
* Shore News Network | Another Jersey Shore Democrat Denounces Disgraced Menendez, Backs Hugin
* Newsmax | GOP Looking for Major Upset in New Jersey
* Cheddar | Republican Bob Hugin Closes the Gap in New Jersey Senate Race
* The Daily Caller | Democratic City Councilman Ditches Menendez, Picks Republican in New Jersey Senate Race
* The Jewish Voice | NJ’s Bob Menendez on the Ropes: Bob Hugin Closing In
* The Hill | Democratic New Jersey councilman endorses GOP candidate over embattled Menendez
* Breitbart | Democrat Sen. Bob Menendez’s Re-Election Bid in Big Trouble
* The Star-Ledger | As the campaign kicks off, Menendez is not doing the Democrats any favors

**DEMOCRATS ABANDON BOB MENENDEZ**
"'I’m endorsing him to restore the honesty and integrity to the office,' said Fozman, who Shorebeat reports previously served as Brick's council president." Your donation will be used to help Senate Republicans respond to the Democrats’ deceptive attack ads with uplifting television, internet, and radio ads. Additionally, we will use your contribution to mobilize Republican voters on Election Day. Make an emergency (4x Matched) contribution now to secure President Trump’s Majority in the Senate. ** ** This election is going to be a knock-down-drag-out fight to the finish. Democrats aren’t going to pull any punches. We’re counting on you to help us fight back and win in November. Thank you, Newt Gingrich If you agree that President Trump and Republicans are MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, text MAGA to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. T&C;/Privacy Policy: | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions to the NRSC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. 107 S. West Street • #115 • Alexandria VA, 22314 **

name: Bob Casey
subject: some thoughts on this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6378/51dbcc2a/1d64e29d/3a8be2c/4125763618/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") I certainly haven't been quiet about what's going on with the President's Supreme Court nomination, team.

But when a decision will affect the balance of the Supreme Court for a generation, and when workers' rights, voting rights and health care are all at risk, I just won't be quiet.

This nomination is the fruit of a corrupt bargain between the President and far-right, corporate special interests. President Trump has sold one of his most solemn responsibilities to the highest bidder, and I refuse to pretend that's right or normal.

These are basic democratic principles we're talking about, fundamental stuff. You didn't get a vote in who compiled the Heritage Foundation's list of acceptable nominees -- your voice wasn't a part of that process. And now that thousands of pages of documents from this nominee's career are being kept out of public view, this administration is once again denying you your right to have a say in who fills this Supreme Court vacancy. It's fundamentally wrong.

I've been attacked by my opponent, the Koch brothers and the Republican National Committee for taking this stand, but that doesn't bother me. It's my responsibility as a senator to make sure that the people of Pennsylvania are represented in Washington, and when their voices are being cut out of absolutely critical decisions, I refuse to be silent. This is just too important, and the consequences of what we do now will affect generations of Americans. Kids who deserve a future with access to health care, a good education, good jobs with fair wages and, fundamentally, the right to have a vote in the future of our nation.

So I won't be quiet. I'm going to keep speaking out, and I hope you'll speak out with me.

Thanks,

Bob [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180907_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Our opponent dumped almost $1.5 million into his campaign at the last minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I am suing him.
#

Peter -
This week, we found out that we outraised all of our opponents at the last deadline. Despite their corporate money and their billionaire donors, people like you came together to show the strength of our grassroots campaign.
But now, one of our opponents is making an unprecedented move to try to buy this election for himself. At the last minute, he transferred almost $1.5 million from his federal committee -- money that was intended to go toward his congressional race -- to spend on this race.
That is unacceptable. So I am suing him because we cannot ignore this violation of the law, but with just days left, we also have to prepare for the worst case scenario.
**[Make a $3 donation right now to help us fight back against this last-minute spending. We cannot let this action go unanswered.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78090e/6e822e2f/1d6fb6b4/4173a0cc/376532441/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MDctMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180907-1-full")**
Playing fast and loose with campaign finance laws like this is outrageous - especially for someone who wants to be New York's top law enforcement officer. In fact, it should be disqualifying.
This is the very corruption that I'm running to stop. As I've said from the start, **I do not care how powerful you are, how much money you have, or what your political party is -- no one is above the law.**
Best,
Zephyr
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d78090e/6e822e2f/1d6fb6b4/4173a0cc/376532441/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MDctMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180907-1-full")

name: Mark Warner
subject: The morning after Election Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, how do you want to feel the morning after Election Day?

When all the votes have been counted and the 2018 midterms are officially in the books, I'm personally hoping to feel the way I did after last year's elections in Virginia: full of hope for this Commonwealth, and for our nation.

**But keeping last year 's blue wave going and making sure Virginia helps take back the House and the Senate won't be easy.**

Not only do we need to protect Tim's seat, we've also got some House seats to flip and local candidates to elect. And we've got to fight back against Corey Stewart and the GOP's ugly attacks on Virginia Democrats.

[Will you chip in to help make sure this team has the resources to win on Election Day?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1125/3e0906/72c20abd/3e36de13/2101319994/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180907_1_FR_MRW_September-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+help+make+sure+this+&utm_campaign=20180907_1_FR_MRW_September-LDND&source=20180907_1_FR_MRW_September-LDND") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1125/3e0906/72c20abd/3e36de12/2101319994/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180907_1_FR_MRW_September-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180907_1_FR_MRW_September-LDND&source=20180907_1_FR_MRW_September-LDND")

clean_body: | | Derek, how do you want to feel the morning after Election Day? When all the votes have been counted and the 2018 midterms are officially in the books, I'm personally hoping to feel the way I did after last year's elections in Virginia: full of hope for this Commonwealth, and for our nation. But keeping last year 's blue wave going and making sure Virginia helps take back the House and the Senate won't be easy. Not only do we need to protect Tim's seat, we've also got some House seats to flip and local candidates to elect. And we've got to fight back against Corey Stewart and the GOP's ugly attacks on Virginia Democrats. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" "" will be here before we know it, and I want to spend election night celebrating the new Democratic House members from Virginia, welcoming my friend Tim back to the Senate, and watching the blue wave that started right here in 2017 sweep across the nation. I want to feel even more hopeful this year than I did in 2017 - and, as an active member of Team Kaine, I know you do too, Derek. "" Thanks for supporting Team Kaine, Mark Warner "" * | "" "" ""

subject: despite the GOP’s attacks, we’re sharing Abigail’s story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Despite a desperate, uncalculated swipe at Abigail's integrity, we continue to move this grassroots campaign forward with our positive, honest message.
| | Peter, **As you know, a Republican Super PAC jumped in to support Rep. Dave Brat 's campaign yesterday by launching their first negative television ad against Abigail.** It amounted to nothing more than a grossly misleading attack and a feeble attempt to distract voters from Abigail's compelling candidacy. Too bad for them, it's not going to work because we continue to move this grassroots campaign forward while sharing Abigail's service record and her commitment to our country and communities. [_**Peter, watch our ad, "Stack," and then make a grassroots donation if you can, so we can continue to share our own message:**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/3OULR1sOu2r6cjsVtAH0kd8LnaBh4W5xCdT0HPjGkW0=/AzX965L1FLYCVYHjboXTevhP_nyzMoy_A47OsRmK4aM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.07_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3OULR1sOu2r6cjsVtAH0kd8LnaBh4W5xCdT0HPjGkW0=/AzX965L1FLYCVYHjboXTevhP_nyzMoy_A47OsRmK4aM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.07_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This ad shines a spotlight on the nature of Abigail's background. She built her entire career on a desire to protect Americans from harm -- an important aspect of her compelling biography that demonstrates her commitment to serving people first. As Abigail says in the ad, we need more representatives in Congress who have _our_ back, because with all the special interest money in politics, it's hard to tell who's looking out for whom. But with Abigail's service in law enforcement, her counter-terrorism work in the CIA, and her refusal to accept corporate PAC money, there's little room for doubt -- **Abigail stands with us.** [**I hope you will help us share her meaningful promise by watching the video and making a donation today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3OULR1sOu2r6cjsVtAH0kd8LnaBh4W5xCdT0HPjGkW0=/AzX965L1FLYCVYHjboXTevhP_nyzMoy_A47OsRmK4aM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.07_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3OULR1sOu2r6cjsVtAH0kd8LnaBh4W5xCdT0HPjGkW0=/AzX965L1FLYCVYHjboXTevhP_nyzMoy_A47OsRmK4aM=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.07_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3OULR1sOu2r6cjsVtAH0kd8LnaBh4W5xCdT0HPjGkW0=/FWfsmAmyIZjAqiIZ_XWo43-FQWKtTQngN8K-F_3JYyY=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/3OULR1sOu2r6cjsVtAH0kd8LnaBh4W5xCdT0HPjGkW0=/teRoXIXQzzNyf1_M7QudKCNUrZ7DiI_0jOrNUAlaKGc=)_

body:
**5,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED**
[**Tell the Senate to oppose Brett Kavanaugh 's nomination! -> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/SmoXcO5S9SvF6i1WBTJAf3gg06O6eKCCqG4VS4K7_-0=/_bs06qeYCv06rXx2EIVFeCORAXnRp78zx6sfb-j6zxY=)

Peter - Judge Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation to the Supreme Court will change the direction of our country for generations.

On issues of environmental protections, labor, voting rights, and more, one thing is very clear: Kavanaugh's record is not in line with our values.

[**We must take action to oppose his nomination. Add your name here to send a clear message and tell the Senate to reject Kavanaugh!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/SmoXcO5S9SvF6i1WBTJAf3gg06O6eKCCqG4VS4K7_-0=/_bs06qeYCv06rXx2EIVFeCORAXnRp78zx6sfb-j6zxY=)

[SIGN ON](https://act.myngp.com/el/SmoXcO5S9SvF6i1WBTJAf3gg06O6eKCCqG4VS4K7_-0=/_bs06qeYCv06rXx2EIVFeCORAXnRp78zx6sfb-j6zxY=) The next Supreme Court justice will be in a position to affect our hard-fought progress. With Kavanaugh on the bench, the future of that progress is uncertain.

His record is filled with decisions against executive accountability, upholding disenfranchisement, and undermining workers' rights. And that's just the surface.

[**Don 't hesitate to act, Peter! Sign on to send a clear message to the Senate that we oppose Kavanaugh's nomination!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/SmoXcO5S9SvF6i1WBTJAf3gg06O6eKCCqG4VS4K7_-0=/_bs06qeYCv06rXx2EIVFeCORAXnRp78zx6sfb-j6zxY=)

Thanks,

Mike

With Kavanaugh on the bench, the future of that progress is uncertain. His record is filled with decisions against executive accountability, upholding disenfranchisement, and undermining workers' rights. And that's just the surface. = Thanks, Mike Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa CA 94581 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Say NO to Kavanaugh -- Fight climate change!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court would be a climate disaster.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd783ce/2f5ea88d/75e76633/2cbc4cf0/2158750487/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/stop-brett-kavanaugh?utm_source=ema_2018-09-07_kavanaugh-climate&source=ema_2018-09-07_kavanaugh-climate&utm_campaign=kavanaugh-climate&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Listening to Kavanaugh's confirmation hearings this week has made it abundantly clear: We must do everything we can to stop his ascension to the highest court in our nation. Brett Kavanaugh is backwards on all of the values that you and I share, friend. He's notoriously anti-choice -- he would overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , dismantling the reproductive rights of millions of women. He opposes the _Affordable Care Act_ and would do away with protections for those with pre-existing conditions like asthma. He's acted to further strip voting rights from disenfranchised voters. And he holds extreme deference for executive authority: He thinks that presidents should not be subject to criminal investigations (like the one Trump is presently undergoing). But I write today to urge you to sign our petition to stop Kavanaugh for one more reason: Kavanaugh would be a climate disaster. [**If you too want our children and grandchildren to live on a healthy planet not ravaged by the onset of climate change, please add your name next to mine right now:**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd783ce/2f5ea88d/75e76633/2cbc4cf0/2158750487/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/stop-brett-kavanaugh?utm_source=ema_2018-09-07_kavanaugh-climate&source=ema_2018-09-07_kavanaugh-climate&utm_campaign=kavanaugh-climate&utm_medium=ema") | [SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd783ce/2f5ea88d/75e76633/2cbc4cf0/2158750487/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/stop-brett-kavanaugh?utm_source=ema_2018-09-07_kavanaugh-climate&source=ema_2018-09-07_kavanaugh-climate&utm_campaign=kavanaugh-climate&utm_medium=ema")
---
When it comes to climate legislation, Kavanaugh has shown time and again that he will side with the wealthy and powerful over what's best for the people of this country. He's worked his whole career to limit the power of EPA regulations, enabling big polluters to pump their pollutants into our air. He's blocked clean air safeguards for air pollution that crosses state lines, putting millions at risk of health problems. With these decisions, he's drastically limited our ability to fight back against climate change.
There's no mincing words here -- Kavanaugh's confirmation to our Supreme Court would represent a drastic shift in our ability to fight back against big polluters. He's threatening to take away our access to clean air, clean water, and a clean energy future.
**So join me today in demanding that the Senate reject this extreme nominee. We must protect our clean air and water, and our public health, for future generations. We cannot strip our ability to fight climate change now, when it is so critical for us to act.**
[**Will you add your name next to mine to help keep this anti-environmental extremist off of the high court?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd783ce/2f5ea88d/75e76633/2cbc4cf0/2158750487/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/stop-brett-kavanaugh?utm_source=ema_2018-09-07_kavanaugh-climate&source=ema_2018-09-07_kavanaugh-climate&utm_campaign=kavanaugh-climate&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd783ce/2f5ea88d/75e76633/2cbc4cf0/2158750487/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/stop-brett-kavanaugh?utm_source=ema_2018-09-07_kavanaugh-climate&source=ema_2018-09-07_kavanaugh-climate&utm_campaign=kavanaugh-climate&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd783ce/2f5ea88d/75e76633/2cbc4cf7/2158750487/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Erin Dolan
subject: GOP still fighting to end the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend: The Affordable Care Act is back on the GOP chopping block, and people in New Jersey and around the country are furious.

Twenty GOP-led states are suing to overturn the ACA and allow insurance companies to once again avoid covering pre-existing conditions. **This assault on affordable health care could leave nearly a quarter of Americans without coverage, all to protect more corporate profits.**

[**This must be stopped, and Democratic Senator Bob Menendez is fighting tooth and nail to protect us. If you support the Affordable Care Act and protecting those with pre-existing conditions, chip in $5 or more today to stand with Bob Menendez in this fight.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cc8/3af3c5d/3ab701c4/4ec3cac8/3297227785/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_aca?gpsid=5_73_3446&refcode=em18_180907_ACALaw_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180907_ACALaw_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+This+must+be+stopped+and+Democratic+Sena") [Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cc8/3af3c5d/3ab701c4/4ec3cacb/3297227785/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_aca?gpsid=5_73_3446&refcode=em18_180907_ACALaw_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180907_ACALaw_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+Donate") A whopping 72 percent of Americans know how important it is to stop insurance companies from charging sick people more money for coverage -- but that isn't preventing Republicans. And we all know where Bob Hugin will stand on the issue -- given his repeated history of forcing cancer patients to choose between health and financial stability.

**The stakes in this race have never been higher.**

Bob Menendez has spent his career fighting for high-quality, affordable healthcare for all. Greedy CEO Bob Hugin has chosen to pad his own pockets at the expense of sick people and made health care less accessible. Hugin even said gutting the ACA would be "great for the country and consumers."

[**We must stop this attack on the most vulnerable among us. Stand with Bob Menendez today by chipping in $5 or whatever you can afford today in his fight to protect New Jersey families and those across the country.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cc8/3af3c5d/3ab701c4/4ec3caca/3297227785/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_aca?gpsid=5_73_3446&refcode=em18_180907_ACALaw_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180907_ACALaw_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+We+must+stop+this+attack+on+the+most+vul")

Thank you,

Erin

Erin Dolan
Menendez for Senate

[Donate](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cc8/3af3c5d/3ab701c4/4ec3cacd/3297227785/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_aca?gpsid=5_73_3446&refcode=em18_180907_ACALaw_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180907_ACALaw_fnd_gq_cust__ED_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=4+-+Donate")

name: Ashley Walukevich
subject: 60 Days from Today.
body:
Derek, We are entering the final stretch of this election, and the Democrats are banking on Republicans staying home and NOT working hard this cycle. We're going to surprise them with all we can do. Join our Republican Victory Team as we race into the general election for [National Day of Action on September 15th!](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyPp0LnUzJbJd5sqRe8vU00k-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30Mj5A7K8hP4c-2FPa-2FNBZ9PGtbGcBfFUTZ-2FA1DnGNWtbP4vMNnUIRajUCB1I6OGZSStXs-2FYBDwuCcXdXXCJJ6MXdtDw2fzDXLZHThuFJ4KTxGbnZu2Q9BxHWRCDIY7YoqnWnhrrSA9duNoku6TmPXOUDKkPNnsNIPVRs24dYyQOvXBes5iEPA6vogGI3YzGG1ZxF9r1P9-2BL9klVhrgmy-2Bz7gW9gL0UOMifttnjubcq-2BiqPUw78tejAT0Bnkymwu-2FUQB6fFt-2B-2BT65mnG5D5un-2FMnc8w-3D-3D) With the countdown to Election Day on, we need "all engines go" to ensure we support our President, flip our Congressional seats and re-elect Governor Chris Sununu!

name: Instant Polling (via Team Lipinski)
subject: predatory student loans [question inside]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Hey Peter--did you see this? Make
sure to take our 1-click poll to mark the beginning of
back-to-school season, and to help Dan protect our students from
predatory loans.

Begin forwarded message:

With back-to-school season in full swing, we want to
hear from you: Do you think that students should be protected
from predatory and fraudulent loan servicers?

YES
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-devos-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_WL_180907_1_2_yes&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&amount=15&recurring=1 )

NO
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-devos-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_WL_180907_1_2_no&amount=15&recurring=1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

As a former teacher, I have to say that seeing kids heading
back to school is one of my favorite times of year.

But, Betsy DeVos has done nothing but make it more and more
difficult for students to get an education. This time, she’s
trying to rescind Obama-era rules that govern how to protect
student loan borrowers from fraud and deception.

This latest action is nothing but pandering to loan
servicers and for-profit colleges. DeVos doesn’t care about
students, and she certainly doesn’t care if they’re taken
advantage of. While I’m working to alleviate students from the
burdens of school debt, DeVos’s actions are aiding lenders, not
students and their futures.

With back-to-school season in full swing, we want to
hear from you: Do you think that students should be protected
from predatory and fraudulent loan servicers?

YES
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-devos-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_WL_180907_1_2_yes&amount=15&recurring=1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

NO
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-devos-up?refcode=DL_EM_SV_WL_180907_1_2_no&amount=15&recurring=1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

When students make the decision to go to college, they
shouldn’t have to fear that the institutions in place to help
them will actually try to scam them.

DeVos should be working for students, not for those who
actively engage in predatory behavior.

Thanks for helping me stand up for our students.

Dan

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

Contributions or gifts to Lipinski for Congress are not tax
deductible.

-----------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
-----------------------------------------------

Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs IL 60558 United States

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Trump attacked Ben Jealous and Maryland immigrants
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
President Trump attacked Our Revolution-endorsed candidate Ben Jealous for supporting free college tuition.
#
Friends,
At a campaign rally in Montana last night, President Trump attacked Our Revolution-endorsed candidate Ben Jealous for supporting free college tuition.
The president said the Democratic candidate for governor wants to pay for "illegal aliens" to go to college. I have some news for the president: **no human being is illegal.**
A college education must be for ALL, no matter where we come from or how much money our families have. But it is not enough to just say these things - we need to back up our beliefs with action.
[**President Trump has already raised $100,000 for Ben 's opponent. Pitch in $5 right now to help Ben Jealous and Our Revolution fight back against his divisive attacks and win the gubernatorial race in Maryland.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a960/bed43eb/7762fedc/75fca858/2140588821/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-jealous?refcode=em180907")
The bottom line is that if we work together, Ben Jealous can win this race. We can ensure tuition-free public college for every single Marylander. Ben is running for criminal justice reform, a $15 minimum wage, and yes, free tuition for every single person attending Maryland public colleges and universities regardless of their immigration status.
**We are better as a society and as a country when we lift each other up to our fullest potential. The president may not understand it, but you do.** That's why you are a part of this movement, and why I am asking you to respond to President Trump's attack with action.
[**Can you make a $5 donation today to help Ben Jealous and Our Revolution win the governor's race in Maryland?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a960/bed43eb/7762fedc/75fca858/2140588821/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-jealous?refcode=em180907")
This is our opportunity to act. Join me in being a part of electing the most progressive governor Maryland has ever seen. Thank you for taking action to make it happen.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a960/bed43eb/7762fedc/75fca858/2140588821/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-jealous?refcode=em180907")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: 2 months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Winning in November could be the difference between a Senate majority that wants to work and get things done for Americans from all walks of life or..

Friend, in 60 days, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country.

You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not.

Winning in November could be the difference between a Senate majority that wants to work and get things done for Americans from all walks of life or one that just wants to resist and obstruct.

Defeating Tammy Baldwin could be the difference between progress on our America First agenda, and more of the same in Washington — where nothing gets done.

There's no doubt in my mind about which option I prefer. Wisconsin made it clear in 2016 that they have had enough of DC politics as usual, too.

Our do-nothing senator Tammy Baldwin needs to go! And we've got only two months until Election Day.

clean_body: Winning in November could be the difference between a Senate majority that wants to work and get things done for Americans from all walks of life or.. Friend, in 60 days, Wisconsin has the chance to change the fate of our entire country. You might think that sounds like an exaggeration, but friend, it's not. Winning in November could be the difference between a Senate majority that wants to work and get things done for Americans from all walks of life or one that just wants to resist and obstruct. Defeating Tammy Baldwin could be the difference between progress on our America First agenda, and more of the same in Washington — where nothing gets done. There's no doubt in my mind about which option I prefer. Wisconsin made it clear in 2016 that they have had enough of DC politics as usual, too. Our do-nothing senator Tammy Baldwin needs to go! And we've got only two months until Election Day. Friend, in Wisconsin, I’ve led the charge to get more people working than ever before in state history, cut taxes by $8 billion and get unemployment under 3 percent. Now I’m committed to get things done in the U.S. Senate by fighting for the middle class, fixing healthcare and lowering taxes. We can't afford to lose! That’s why I'm reaching out to each and every supporter to make sure we're all doing our part to win this thing. If you can chip in today to help us build our funds in these final months, we'll be one step closer to victory. Please, stand with me today and help keep us going full speed ahead until November. Contribute today: I am counting on you. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

subject: FWD from Sen. Warner (and a bad poll)

body:
| | Derek, Mark Warner asked how you want to feel after Election Day, and no one knows better than him what it's like to have a race go from a sure bet to a potential defeat. _And he knows our most recent poll numbers - with only a five point margin - are not a good sign._

**I want to tell Senator Warner that his message raised $20,000 so he sees how fired up people are to win Virginia and to make sure this race doesn 't slip through our fingers. \-----FORWARDED MESSAGE-----

FROM: Mark Warner
SUBJECT: The morning after Election Day
Derek, how do you want to feel the morning after Election Day?

When all the votes have been counted and the 2018 midterms are officially in the books, I'm personally hoping to feel the way I did after last year's elections in Virginia: full of hope for this Commonwealth, and for our nation.

**But keeping last year 's blue wave going and making sure Virginia helps take back the House and the Senate won't be easy.**

Not only do we need to protect Tim's seat, we've also got some House seats to flip and local candidates to elect. And we've got to fight back against Corey Stewart and the GOP's ugly attacks on Virginia Democrats.

[Will you chip in to help make sure this team has the resources to win on Election Day?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1121/3e0906/72d2d839/3e36d536/3479751917/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180907_2_FR_JR_Warner-FWD-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+help+make+sure+this+&utm_campaign=20180907_2_FR_JR_Warner-FWD-LDND&source=20180907_2_FR_JR_Warner-FWD-LDND")

clean_body: | | Derek, Mark Warner asked how you want to feel after Election Day, and no one knows better than him what it's like to have a race go from a sure bet to a potential defeat. And he knows our most recent poll numbers - with only a five point margin - are not a good sign. I want to tell Senator Warner that his message raised $20,000 so he sees how fired up people are to win Virginia and to make sure this race doesn 't slip through our fingers. "" Attaching the Senator's note below. No regrets, Derek! Jess | | "" | "" \-----FORWARDED MESSAGE----- FROM: Mark Warner SUBJECT: The morning after Election Day Derek, how do you want to feel the morning after Election Day? When all the votes have been counted and the 2018 midterms are officially in the books, I'm personally hoping to feel the way I did after last year's elections in Virginia: full of hope for this Commonwealth, and for our nation. But keeping last year 's blue wave going and making sure Virginia helps take back the House and the Senate won't be easy. Not only do we need to protect Tim's seat, we've also got some House seats to flip and local candidates to elect. And we've got to fight back against Corey Stewart and the GOP's ugly attacks on Virginia Democrats. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" "" will be here before we know it, and I want to spend election night celebrating the new Democratic House members from Virginia, welcoming my friend Tim back to the Senate, and watching the blue wave that started right here in 2017 sweep across the nation. I want to feel even more hopeful this year than I did in 2017 - and, as an active member of Team Kaine, I know you do too, Derek. "" Thanks for supporting Team Kaine, Mark Warner "" * | "" "" ""

subject: what matters to you

body:
| | |
---
Friends - just a few hours left before our midnight deadline and we're still 107 grassroots donors short of our goal.
Governor Chris Sununu has put the corporate agenda of his wealthy special interest donors above the people of New Hampshire for too long. That's why this campaign is all about _finally_ prioritizing the things that matter to Granite Staters like you - no exceptions.
I'm not taking a single donation from corporations because I'm _only_ accountable to families like yours. **But that means I'm depending on grassroots donors like you to help fuel this campaign.**
**[Please, give $5 or more before midnight- anything you can spare makes a huge difference - to help me defeat Sununu and put families like yours above corporate interests as governor of New Hampshire.](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc495c/d0ce7de/51df65df/9cd6907/1055948586/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTE3LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk117-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Molly

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Trump doesn't get a vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | "Sen. Sherrod Brown and Rep. Jim Renacci may be the names on Ohio's ballot for the U.S. Senate this fall, but a third name -- President Donald Trump -- might as well be listed too."
\-- _Akron Beacon Journal; 9/2/2018_ | | | [CONTRIBUTE TO RE-ELECT SHERROD](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff80/4462dc26/67298249/20058bb3/168505393/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTA2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180906?refcode=sbe180906_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
President Trump keeps coming to Ohio. Unfortunately, it isn't because he is concerned about General Motors shipping jobs from Ohio to Mexico or because he wants to make college affordable for Ohio students.
**The President keeps coming to Ohio because he wants me to lose my job as your Senator.**
Peter, I need your help to make sure he doesn't succeed. [**Our final FEC End of Quarter deadline _of this election_ is approaching quickly, and we need to raise $655,000 before then. Can you pitch in?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff80/4462dc26/67298249/20058bb3/168505393/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTA2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180906?refcode=sbe180906_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff80/4462dc26/67298249/20058bb2/168505393/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTA2IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180906?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180906_m_5&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff80/4462dc26/67298249/20058bb2/168505393/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTA2IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180906?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180906_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff80/4462dc26/67298249/20058bb2/168505393/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTA2IiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjI2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180906?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180906_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff80/4462dc26/67298249/20058bb3/168505393/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTA2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180906?refcode=sbe180906_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
**My opponent doesn 't just have President Trump backing him up. He has special interest groups on his side that spend millions of dollars on elections.**
They want me to lose my job because I fight like hell for hardworking Americans in the Senate. I'm fighting to protect and expand access to affordable healthcare. I'm working to make sure the wages folks bring home are enough to live on. I want safe communities, affordable education, and good-paying jobs for all of our families.
**I'm relying on you to help our team hit our financial goal one average online contribution of $26 at a time.**
[**Whether you can match our $26 average online contribution, or give $5 or $10 -- chip in whatever you can today.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302fff80/4462dc26/67298249/20058bb3/168505393/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTA2IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180906?refcode=sbe180906_m_other&refcode2=3268183") And please know that I sincerely appreciate each and every dollar you give.
Trump and the special interests can do (and spend) whatever they like to defeat me. But on Election Day, they don't get a vote. Ohioans do. As long as we keep working hard and hit our goals, we will defeat their attacks and win.
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---

body:
| | | | I'm going to pull the numbers soon and let Martin, Brad, and our grassroots team know if we hit our goal for volunteer supplies. Last time I checked, we were still around $3,000 short.

**_[You can still contribute to help us reach our goal before midnight. Donate here->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-sept?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+You+can+still+contribute+to+help+us+reac&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180907_2_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180907_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180907_2_4")_**

Thanks,
Steve

_Begin original message from Brad Elkins:_

Martin reached out yesterday asking for help supplying our hardworking volunteers before our weekend organizing starts, and I want to update you on our progress.

**We still have around $8,000 to raise by midnight tonight, and hitting this goal will decide whether or not we 'll have to scale back our plans. We could really use your help.**
**[SUPPORT MARTIN'S VOLUNTEERS](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-sept?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+SUPPORT+MARTINrsquoS+VOLUNTEERS&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180907_2_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180907_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180907_2_4")** Since former Libertarian presidential candidate Gary Johnson got in the race against Martin, we've seen a wave of support. With Martin now facing two extreme opponents, we need all the help we can get fighting back against twice the super PACs and special interests groups trying to sway the race.

The increased enthusiasm is great for our campaign, but that means we're going through supplies much quicker than we originally planned. **We can 't risk leaving our volunteers and grassroots organizers hanging!**

**_[Hitting our grassroots supplies goal before midnight tonight is critical for our race. Please, can you contribute $29 or more to help our grassroots team keep up their great work?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-volunteer-supplies-sept?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+Hitting+our+grassroots+supplies+goal+bef&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180907_2_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180907_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180907_2_4")_**
